story.text: **The Null Blade.** Total exposure. Where all forging begins. ☷ The Receptive.

## On the lattice

- **Complement** (bnot = 63 − 0 = 63): [[Artefact 63 — The Creative]] — everything this blade is not.
- **Successor** (the dihedral walk `neg(bnot(x)) = succ(x)`): [[Artefact 1 — Unnamed]].
- Forged in [[The Workshops]] — each shop instances one or more of these six dimensions at its vertex.
